title: How to Find the Group ID Within Monday
excerpt: I’m trying to find a Group ID within Monday itself but I can’t find anywhere where that number is displayed. Is it even possible to find a group ID in within Monday?

posts.author: JayRenn (Jay Rennemeyer)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to find a Group ID within Monday itself but I can’t find anywhere where that number is displayed. Is it even possible to find a group ID in within Monday?

posts.author: CatalinBaciu (Catalin Baciu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Group IDs aren’t necessarily numerical, and I don’t think there’s an easy way to see a Group ID within Monday.com (similar to the Item ID column for example).

It’s easy to find out within Make.com as any search for item or get item modules will bring up the group ID.

You might also find this to be useful Groups
